issues.description: `no-restricted-imports` is close but not exact: it misses imports of the internal directory root such as `@/features/space/game/internal` or `../../game/internal`, because the patterns only match paths below `internal/**`. It also flags same-module upward relative imports like `../internal/foo`, which are not cross-module violations.
issues.recommendation: Include root-directory forms such as `@/**/internal` and `../**/internal`, and refine the relative-path strategy if same-module `../internal/*` imports are intended to remain valid. A custom rule or module-scoped overrides may be needed to distinguish same-module from cross-module relative imports precisely.
